rejectedAlternatives.reason: Core closes every section boundary, retaining the proven seventeen-page natural and eighteen-page spaced floors.
Zone-start zero spacing was valid only at a fresh page; continuous semantic headings require an explicit leading gap.
An atomic spacer can move to a fresh page independently and violate suppress-before-first-fragment semantics.
Page-count reconciliation must not discard source-backed report evidence or mutate the authored document.

downstreamBlockers.message: Each reconciled manifest item still needs its exact family initial cursor and bounded pagination input.
The repeating footer is structurally equivalent, but generated page-number text still lacks final measurement.
Gross capacity cannot decide twelve-page fidelity; Core must execute page-top suppression, table splitting, and continuation overhead.
The reconciled manifest and spacing bindings are ready, but no family window or document transition has executed.
